# Synthesis: the compact answer {#sec-synthesis}

```{r}
#| label: synthesis-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
})
options(warn = 2)                                    # warning-fatal render contract
targets::tar_source()                                # constants + report theme helpers
targets::tar_load(synthesis_report)                  # ONE compact target, no heavy inputs
targets::tar_load(report_visuals)                    # compact visual grammar over report targets
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

sr <- synthesis_report
rv <- report_visuals
sv <- rv$synthesis_visual_abstract
status_grid <- sv$status_grid
source_matrix <- sv$source_matrix
unsupported_grid <- sv$unsupported_status_grid

status_labels <- c(
  core_supported = "core supported",
  corroborated = "corroborated",
  focused_support = "focused support",
  not_supported = "not supported",
  not_earned = "not earned",
  open_caveat = "open caveat"
)
status_colours <- c(
  core_supported = "#B0344D",
  corroborated = "#3F5A6B",
  focused_support = "#6B7A3F",
  not_supported = "#777777",
  not_earned = "#B7A06A",
  open_caveat = "#7C5A86"
)

answer_sentence <- paste(sr$headline, collapse = " ")
claim_order <- rev(status_grid$claim)
status_order <- names(status_labels)
status_grid$claim <- factor(status_grid$claim, levels = claim_order)
status_grid$status_label <- factor(status_grid$status_label,
                                   levels = unname(status_labels[status_order]))
source_matrix$claim <- factor(source_matrix$claim, levels = claim_order)
source_matrix$source_label <- factor(source_matrix$source_label,
                                     levels = c("microglia", "trajectory",
                                                "mechanism", "cross-modality"))
source_matrix$source_status <- ifelse(source_matrix$role == "none", "not cited",
                                      source_matrix$status)
source_matrix$role_label <- c(none = "", supporting = "S", primary = "P")[
  as.character(source_matrix$role)
]
unsupported_grid$claim <- factor(unsupported_grid$claim,
                                 levels = rev(unsupported_grid$claim))
unsupported_grid$status_label <- factor(unsupported_grid$status_label,
                                        levels = unname(status_labels[status_order]))
```

`r answer_sentence`

```{r}
#| label: fig-synthesis-visual-abstract
#| fig-width: 8.8
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Visual abstract: claim rows stay status-coloured and chapter-tied."
ggplot(status_grid, aes(status_label, claim, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = chapter), size = 2.8, colour = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = status_colours, guide = "none", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Closed claim state") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-synthesis-evidence-map
#| fig-width: 8.4
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Source matrix: P primary, S supporting compact target."
ggplot(source_matrix, aes(source_label, claim, fill = source_status)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_text(aes(label = role_label), size = 3.1, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(status_colours, `not cited` = "#F1F1F1"),
    breaks = c(names(status_labels), "not cited"),
    labels = c(status_labels, `not cited` = "not cited"),
    name = "claim status"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Compact target provenance") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-synthesis-status
#| fig-width: 8.2
#| fig-height: 2.8
#| fig-cap: "Unsupported grid: nulls, blocked states and caveats remain visible."
ggplot(unsupported_grid, aes(status_label, claim, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = chapter), size = 2.8, colour = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = status_colours, guide = "none", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Unsupported, not-earned and caveat rows") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )
```
